home.title: Hong Yejin
home.subtitle: Certified Korean Teacher
home.content: Hello! My name is Hong Ye-jin, and I teach Korean to international students, both online and in person in France. Are you looking for someone to help you learn Korean? Then feel free to sign up for my course!

about.title: Hong Yejin, Korean teacher
about.xp2: I have taught Korean language and culture to foreigners in several academies in Seoul (group and individual classes, in person and online).
about.xp3: Korean language and culture courses at a Korean language school in France (online/in-person group classes)
about.diploma2: Master's degree in Teaching Korean as a Foreign Language (08/2024)

info.title: Course types
info.table2: 2. Preparation of TOPIK I and II
info.info1: All levels available, from beginner to advanced.
info.info2: All types of courses available: Topik I/II preparation, Korean conversation, grammar learning, reading and writing, etc.
info.info3: A 20-30 minute preparatory meeting will take place before registration for the course (free).
info.info4: Normally, the lesson lasts 1 hour. But you can request the duration of the lesson you want (30 min, 1h 30, etc.) and the price will change according to the duration.
info.info5: The class will take place on Zoom. I will send you the link by email or SMS.
info.info6: The manual is not mandatory. You can view the course content on the screen.
info.info7: During classes, speaking in Korean is recommended, but you can speak in French or English if necessary.

contact.title: Request a consultation !
contact.content: Before registering for a course, a free 10-20 minute consultation is offered. Following this consultation, we will determine your registration, as well as the type, date, time, and number of classes.
contact.name: Name:
contact.message_placeholder: Please state your reasons for wanting to study Korean, your current level, the class schedule you would like to attend, and any questions you would like to ask.
contact.success: Your message has been successfully sent!
